title: Incense Stick and Cone Holder Sun and Moon Aluminium with Copper Finish Diameter 9.5 cm Round
features: Mystical symbol: The artistic sun and moon motifs give the incense holder a deep meaning and make it a special element for ritual tables, meditation corners or as a stylish decoration.
Elegant workmanship - Made of robust aluminium and refined with an attractive copper antique finish, the incense holder impresses with its high-quality look and timeless elegance.
Versatile use: whether for fragrant incense cones or up to five incense sticks at the same time, this holder provides an atmospheric ambience and can be used flexibly.
Practical format - With a diameter of 9.5 cm, the incense holder is compact yet eye-catching, so it fits effortlessly into different home styles.
Easy care and durable - The smooth surface allows for effortless cleaning, while the high-quality material ensures long-lasting enjoyment of this stylish accessory.
description: This artfully designed incense holder combines mystical symbolism with elegant workmanship. The filigree sun and moon motifs make it a special eye-catcher on ritual tables, in meditation corners or as a stylish decoration. Crafted from durable aluminium and finished with a classy copper antique finish, it can hold one incense cone as well as up to five incense sticks at a time. With its compact diameter of 9.5 cm, it blends harmoniously into any room, while the smooth surface allows for effortless cleaning. A versatile accessory for relaxing and atmospheric moments.
